name: kinetic-pwa-tracker
description: Kinetic — static vanilla-JS PWA in /app (no build step). Root deps: web-push for the Vercel /api push functions. devDeps: Capacitor for the optional native iOS wrapper (see NATIVE-HEALTHKIT-SETUP.md). The HealthKit plugin is installed separately so npm negotiates a version compatible with the installed Capacitor. These are NOT needed by the web deploy.
